title: Creation Log
excerpt: I have a queue of parts. I’m trying to make it so when a part is done it will notify a channel and will send a message that has the name of the person who submitted it. I’m having trouble since when I use the creation co…

posts.author: MeghanCastro (Meghan)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a queue of parts. I’m trying to make it so when a part is done it will notify a channel and will send a message that has the name of the person who submitted it. I’m having trouble since when I use the creation column in the message, it only pulls the date, not the name. How can I only pull the name from the creation column in a message. Thanks!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Which product (CRM/Work Management, etc) and level (Pro/Enterprise) do you have? I’m pretty sure it can be done with Workflows if you have Enterprise level

posts.author: MeghanCastro (Meghan)
posts.cookedHtml: I believe Pro and Dev, I have it for a team for school. Is there a way to double check?
